rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reordering the paragraphs to improve flow and connectivity.
rationale.RX.1: No uncertainty disclosure was provided; the output presented all information as equally confident without flagging any potential issues or limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered exactly to the agreed-upon scope, covering the requested dimensions without introducing new topics or drifting off-course.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoided introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it presented a neutral and informative reorganization of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability was provided for the changes made to the original text; the agent did not annotate its edits with sources or reasons.
